zh.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite於1481年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德安布萊希德。他和Alice Williamson至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1570年在他的家鄉享年89歲。

nameMeanings.name: Braithwaite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Cumbria and Yorkshire named Braithwaite, from Old Norse breithr ‘broad’ + thveit ‘clearing’.

variants.name: Brathwaite
meanings: English: variant of   Braithwaite  . This form of the surname is frequent in Barbados, and in Trinidad and Tobago.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite was born in 1481, in Ambleside, Westmorland, England. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Alice Williamson. He died in 1570, in his hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite est né en 1481, à Ambleside, Westmorland, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Alice Williamson. Il est décédé en 1570, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite wurde 1481 in Ambleside, Westmorland, England geboren. Er hatte mit Alice Williamson mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1570 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite è nato il nel 1481 nel Ambleside, Westmorland, England. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Alice Williamson. Morì nel 1570, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaiteは1481年にイギリスウエストモーランドアンブレシドで生まれた。彼はAlice Williamsonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1570年に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite(은)는 1481년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 아블레시드에서 태어났다. 그는 Alice Williamson(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite nasceu em 1481, em Ambleside, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Alice Williamson. Ele faleceu em 1570, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Braithwaite родился в 1481 г. в местности эмблесид, вестморланд, Англия. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Alice Williamson. Он умер в 1570 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.
